text:
(In reply to Bernard Spil from comment #7)

Installing mariadb101-server-10.1.13...
pkg-static: mariadb101-server-10.1.13 conflicts with mariadb101-client-10.1.13 (installs files into the same place).  Problematic file: /usr/local/lib/mysql/plugin/dialog.so
